title: Berger Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Berger Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
